series_metadata.series_description: This schedule is to accommodate the new State Accounting system, Workflow, that is used to process multiple interactive documents. Contained in this schedule are Workflow documents and supporting documentation. These document include but are not limited to Purchase Orders (direct & otherwise), Vouchers, Commitments, Invoices, Contracts & Voided Warrants.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released & all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released & all discrepancies are resolved
